final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing travel brochure design for a 4-day Hangzhou itinerary guide.

Style/medium: trifold brochure layout, suspended on cardstock
Composition: top-down view of real Hangzhou map as background, famous scenic spots marked as floating landmarks
Subject: 4-day Hangzhou travel guide with scenic spot icons
Scene/backdrop: authentic Hangzhou city map
Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: cardstock base with suspended elements
Text (verbatim): 第一天：西湖经典游,断桥残雪→白堤→孤山→曲院风荷→苏堤春晓→花港观鱼→雷峰塔→柳浪闻莺,第二天：禅意杭州,灵隐寺→飞来峰造像→法喜寺→宋城,第三天：九溪烟树徒步,九溪十八涧→龙井村→十里琅珰→云栖竹径,第四天：运河文艺线,拱宸桥→桥西历史街区→小河直街→大兜路香积寺
Constraints: 
Avoid:
